title: Improper venue; transfer
doc_html:
Art. 316.  Improper venue; transfer

When a petition is filed in a court of improper venue, the court shall either dismiss the petition or transfer it to a court of proper venue.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §3, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
